The '''High Priestess''' was a strikingly beautiful [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Kentra]], who had forsaken her name and was a follower of the holy prophet [[Michael Tandre]]. She was in charge of the holy temple erected around the ''[[Alpha Kentrum]]'' and was given the [[Sword of Honor]] by a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] who managed to gain access to the spaceship. She was a [[Master of the Spirit]].<ref name="TP">{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}</ref>
